goals.description: Corner Mina and Jae immediately; demand a direct answer about their silence and whether I'm invited to Echo Club right now.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships (0.5) overrides everything. The uncertainty is physically painful, and my impulsive nature demands immediate resolution. I cannot wait for them to 'come around' later.

goals.description: Aggressively question Theo or anyone else nearby if they aren't found yet; no social niceties, just force information out of them.
goals.rationale: I am assertive by default. If they are hiding from me, I will make sure they know I won't back down until I get what I need. My short planning horizon means I don't care about burning bridges with strangers to save the friends.

goals.description: Cancel all study plans for tomorrow's midterm until the club situation is resolved.
